languages.text: "Я — союзни{mf|к|ца} Ювенны фон Валанциус, вам нечего скрывать от меня".
"I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."
languages.original_text: "Я — союзни{mf|к|ца} Ювенны фон Валанциус, вам нечего скрывать от меня".

traits.locale_text: "I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."
"I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."
"I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."

languages.text: “我是尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯的盟友，你在我面前不用藏着掖着。”
languages.original_text: "I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."

traits.locale_text: “我是尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯的盟友，你在我面前不用藏着掖着。”

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|un allié|une alliée} de Juvenna von Valancius. Vous n'avez rien à me cacher. »
languages.original_text: "I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|un allié|une alliée} de Juvenna von Valancius. Vous n'avez rien à me cacher. »

languages.text: "Ben Juvenna von Valancius'un müttefikiyim. Hiçbir şeyi benden saklamana gerek yok."
languages.original_text: "I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Juvenna von Valancius'un müttefikiyim. Hiçbir şeyi benden saklamana gerek yok."

languages.text: «Soy un{mf||a} aliad{mf|o|a} de Juvenna von Valancius. No tiene nada que ocultarme».

traits.locale_text: «Soy un{mf||a} aliad{mf|o|a} de Juvenna von Valancius. No tiene nada que ocultarme».

languages.text: "Ich bin {mf|ein Verbündeter|eine Verbündete} von Juvenna von Valancius. Ihr müsst nichts vor mir verbergen."
languages.original_text: "I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin {mf|ein Verbündeter|eine Verbündete} von Juvenna von Valancius. Ihr müsst nichts vor mir verbergen."

languages.text: 「私はユベナ・フォン・ヴァランキウスの同盟者です。あなたには隠すものはありません。」
languages.original_text: "I am an ally of Juvenna von Valancius. You have nothing to hide from me."

traits.locale_text: 「私はユベナ・フォン・ヴァランキウスの同盟者です。あなたには隠すものはありません。」
